The '''"Screamer" active jammer''' was a [[Sensor jammer/Legends|sensor jammer]] manufactured by [[Bertriak/Legends|Bertriak]], and was commonly found installed on [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]],<ref name="SWS" /> where it was commonly paired with a [[Carbanti United Electronics/Legends|Carbanti United Electronics]] [[universal transceiver package]]. The "Screamer" disguised the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter's]] [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drive]] emissions, in turn disrupting the [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] systems of enemy [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]],<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> such as [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].<ref name="SWS" /> It was also capable of interfering with the homing [[Computer/Legends|computers]] aboard [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]],<ref name="EGWT" /> but was not powerful enough to jam military-grade sensors on the capital ships.<ref name="SWS" />
